summary: Comprehensive testing of TikTok Auto Commenter dashboard iteration 4 - All new features (DMs tab, Posts tab, 6 stat cards, tab navigation) working correctly. 25/25 backend tests passed, 100% frontend features verified.
seed_data_creation: Test data recreated after DELETE cleanup via bulk reports API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working. Frontend uses Supabase directly for data (comment_reports, dm_reports, post_reports, live_logs tables). DMs and Posts tables currently empty (0 records) but frontend handles gracefully with empty state messages. Backend uses MongoDB for auth endpoints.

backend_auth: POST /api/auth/register - creates new user and returns token
POST /api/auth/login - returns token with valid credentials
GET /api/auth/me - returns user with valid token
POST /api/auth/register with team_name - creates user with team as admin
backend_reports: GET /api/reports - returns all reports with pagination
frontend_new_features: 6 stat cards displayed: This Month, This Week, Comments Today, All Comments, DMs Sent, Posts Made
4 tabs visible: Comments (with count), DMs (with count), Posts (with count), Live Logs
Comments tab shows date range filter, brand breakdown, reports table with data
DMs tab shows stats cards (Total DMs, DMs Today, Unique Recipients, Profiles Used) and DM table
Posts tab shows stats cards (Total Posts, Posts Today, Profiles Used, Scheduler indicator) and Post table
Live Logs tab shows log entries with Idle/Running status indicator
Tab switching works correctly between all 4 tabs
Export CSV button visible and functional
Target config banner shows: 25 Profiles, 100 Videos/Profile, 2,500 Daily Target

design_review.color_scheme: Dark theme (zinc-950 background) with excellent text contrast
design_review.stats_cards: 6 cards with gradient borders - violet (month), blue (week), emerald (today), zinc (total), cyan (DMs), rose (Posts)
design_review.tabs: Clean tab navigation with count badges, violet highlight for active tab
design_review.dm_tab: Cyan color theme with stats cards and empty state message when no data
design_review.posts_tab: Rose color theme with Scheduler indicator showing 'Active on Local Bot'
design_review.logs_tab: Color-coded logs (green=success, red=error, amber=warning, blue=info) with Idle/Running status
design_review.brand_colors: Distinct colors for brands: emerald=Kollabsy, amber=Bump Syndicate, violet/green=Bump Connect
design_review.responsive: Grid layout adapts to screen size

architecture_notes.frontend_data_source: Supabase (direct queries for comment_reports, dm_reports, post_reports, live_logs tables)
architecture_notes.backend_data_source: MongoDB (for auth endpoints - users, teams, team_invites collections)
architecture_notes.supabase_realtime: Realtime subscriptions for instant updates on all tables
architecture_notes.new_supabase_tables: dm_reports and post_reports tables may be empty until local bot syncs data
